scripts.build: esbuild src/handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.mjs --external:@aws-sdk --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../function.zip index.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name newsreal-cron --zip-file fileb://function.zip
